name: kornix-max-bot
description: MAX Messenger bot service shell for KORNIX/POLIV360 backend API integration.

scripts.test: pnpm run typecheck && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test dist-test/tests/**/*.test.js
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm run typecheck && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && c8 --reporter=text node --test dist-test/tests/**/*.test.js
